headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Devon Energy, Lowers Price Target to $63
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $66 to $63.
